channel.title: Raphael P. R.
channel.description: Recent content on Raphael P. R.

item.title: About
item.description: I live in Florianópolis, SC, Brazil. I work at Linx+Neemu+Chaordic as cloud engineer, on cloud team. I’m a passionate about GNU/Linux and Open Source and call me a dreamer but I believe that developers have the power to build a better future. My email is raphaelpr01@gmail.com and you can find me on LinkedIn and GitHub.
